---
name: TypeScript conventions
description: TypeScript and React coding standards for the frontend
applyTo: "src/**/*.ts,src/**/*.tsx"
---

# TypeScript conventions — see [`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md)

The authoritative TypeScript / React / Tailwind / i18n conventions live in
[`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md) — nearest-AGENTS.md wins per the
[agents.md spec](https://agents.md/).

This file exists so GitHub Copilot picks the rules up path-scoped when
editing `src/**/*.{ts,tsx}`. If a rule needs to change, edit
`src/AGENTS.md`, not this file.
